title: Backport refreshed bundled model metadata to 0.144 by sayan-oai · Pull Request #33972 · openai/codex
excerpt: Summary Backport d26a9bf671b1c03aabfc32e1092d137c1feb3962 to the 0.144 release line. Refresh bundled GPT-5.6 model instructions and context-window metadata. Refresh reasoning-summary, skills, perm...
